name: SHORT EXPIRY - CLEARANCE: Enjoy Dog Treats - Dental Chew Sticks with Chicken 180g (7 sticks)
description: Enjoy Dog Treats - Dental Chew Sticks with Chicken , star-shaped to get into more nooks and crannies to help reduce plaque and tartar build-up and bad breath. Pack of 7 sticks. INGREDIENTS:? Derivatives of vegetable origin, cereals, meat and animal derivatives (chicken 7%), vegetable protein extracts, minerals. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 18 Oil Content (%) - 3 Crude Ash (%) - 7 Crude Fiber (%) - 2 Moisture Content (%) - 19 Vitamin A - 5,000 IE Vitamin D3 - 500 IU Vitamin E - 40 mg Copper (Copper II Sulphate, Pentahydrate) - 12 mg FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: 1-2 sticks per day, depending on the size of the dog. Feed as a snack or treat between meals. This product does not replace full-dog food daily. Once open, keep package tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place.
